apps.name: Live Weather
apps.author: dobmen
apps.description: Real-time meteorological dashboard with 7-day forecasts, wind speed, and quick city switching.
apps.expanded_description: Live Weather brings precise, up-to-the-minute forecasting straight to your Kiosk. It features detailed 7-day outlooks, severe weather alerts, and a beautiful dark-mode interface that seamlessly matches your system. Simply tap to switch between your saved cities.

apps.name: Classic Snake
apps.author: dobmen
apps.description: Retro arcade snake game optimized for touchscreen displays with an on-screen D-pad and score tracking.
apps.expanded_description: Enjoy the classic arcade experience of Snake, entirely redesigned for your touch interface. Features an intuitive on-screen directional pad, seamless kinetic movement, and local high-score tracking. Perfect for a quick break!

apps.name: Web Browser
apps.author: dobmen
apps.description: Fast touchscreen web browser with smart Google search detection, quick bookmark buttons, and progress loading.
apps.expanded_description: Navigate the web seamlessly with our custom touch-optimized browser. It features a built-in smart search bar that automatically detects Google queries, a quick-access bookmark manager, and smooth page loading indicators. Explore the web without ever leaving your Kiosk OS environment.

apps.name: Neon Digital
apps.author: dobmen
apps.description: A vibrant, glowing cyberpunk-inspired digital clockface.
apps.expanded_description: Brighten up your Kiosk with this sleek, neon digital clockface. Once downloaded, it will automatically register in your Clockface Selector so you can customize its glowing colors and backgrounds.
